query:
SELECT 
  u.id,
  u.name,
  u.departamentoId,
  d.id as depto_existe,
  u.leaderId,
  ul.name as lider_nome
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN departamentos d ON d.id = u.departamentoId
LEFT JOIN users ul ON ul.id = u.leaderId
WHERE u.role = 'colaborador'
  AND (d.id IS NULL OR ul.id IS NULL)
ORDER BY u.id;
